creator: zero1@zaclys.net
text:
The problem is gone knock works normally, once the sequence is triggered the SSH port is open via the custom command.

Tested on FreeBSD-13.3-RELEASE and FreeBSD-14.1-RELEASE

root@fbstest141:~ # freebsd-version ; uname -rms ; pkg info knock | grep Version
14.1-RELEASE-p1
FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE amd64
Version        : 0.8_1,1


root@fbsdtest133:~ # freebsd-version ; uname -rms ; pkg info knock | grep Version
13.3-RELEASE-p3
FreeBSD 13.3-RELEASE-p3 amd64
Version        : 0.8_1,1


I think this PR can be closed.
I don't know if I am the one who should close it or if it's not appropriate?
